race.comment: SNOWY MOUNTAINS (12) is a daughter of Tagaloa out of Lijiang having her first start. Fitter for two Flemington jump-outs and profiles strongly for this. Low draw and expected to measure up. MIDNIGHTBRILLIANCE (5) is a two-year-old gelding on debut from the stable of Symon Wilde. By Kermadec from Etoile Brillante. Comes here off a Camperdown trial. Blinkers on for hometown debut and watch the market closely. CENTENARY FLORIN (9) is a well-educated two-year-old filly (Squamosa - Fleur De Coin). Won the most recent jump-out and pay to keep an eye on the market despite the tricky gate. STAYINHARMONY (7) is by the sire Stay Inside and from the stakes winning mare Magic Harmony. Has the inside and expected to run well with the blinkers on.
